attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_RA_RULES.RULE_ID, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.NAME, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.STATUS, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.FREQUENCY, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.OCCURRENCES, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.DEFERRED_REVENUE_FLAG, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_RA_RULES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_RA_RULES STG_CG1_RA_RULES,
 (
 select  RULE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_RA_RULES
 minus
 select  RULE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_RA_RULES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.RULE_ID = STG_CG1_RA_RULES.RULE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_RA_RULES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_RA_RULES)
